name: MLSLabsGaussianSplattingRenderer-UE
desc: A high-performance Unreal Engine 5 (UE5) plugin developed by MaLanShan Audio & Video Laboratory, designed for real-time visualization, management, and scalable…
descFull: A high-performance Unreal Engine 5 (UE5) plugin developed by MaLanShan Audio & Video Laboratory, designed for real-time visualization, management, and scalable rendering of 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and dynamic Volumetric Video (4DGS).
